mapper.select: /* adm-item-brandmanagement-sql-oracle.xml - selectBrandCode */ SELECT BRANDKEY , BRANDNM , BRCDLENGTH , CNTRYCD , (SELECT ADCDDTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT WHERE ADCDHDKEY = 'COUNTRYCODE' AND LAKEY = #{slakey} AND ADCDDTKEY = CNTRYCD) AS COUNTRYNAME , ICLOC , ICLENGTH , UOMLOC , UOMLENGTH , WEIGHTLOC , WEIGHTLENGTH , DCMLPOINTLOC , DCMLPOINTLENGTH , PRDCTDATELOC , PRDCTDATELENGTH , EXPLOC , EXPLENGTH , DCMLPOINT , UOM , UOMNM , DELYN , UOMUSEYN , DCMLPOINTUSEYN , ICUSEYN , WEIGHTUSEYN , PRDCTDATEUSEYN , EXPUSEYN , FRUOM , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ICXBRAND WHERE 1=1 AND BRANDKEY = #{brandkey}
